meaning: n.摩拉维亚(捷克和斯洛伐克中部一地区)
examples: Heydrich was appointed Protector of Bohemia and Moravia.
Cross-section of a hut found at Dolne Vestonice, Moravia, Czechoslovakia.
Sigmund Freud was born of Jewish parents, at Freiburg, in Moravia, 68 years ago.
For example, can today's Slovaks trace their roots to Great Moravia in the 9th century?
In 1939, the German army crossed the Czech frontier and Adolf Hitler proclaimed the protectorate of Bohemia and Moravia.
